relations.subject: Luzon boobook
relations.evidence: It is found in numerous protected areas including Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Bataan National Park, Northwest Panay Peninsula Natural Park, Northern Negros Natural Park, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection from deforestation is still lax.{{Cite journal |last1=Olsen |first1=Penny D
